events.name: Pitti Uomo 109
events.note: International menswear trade show. 76+ events across the program.

events.name: Milan Fashion Week Men's FW26/27
events.note: 76+ appointments including 18 runway shows. Prada, Giorgio Armani, Dolce & Gabbana headlined.

events.name: Who's Next Paris (January)
events.note: 1,500+ international fashion brands. Ready-to-wear, accessories, beauty, and lifestyle.

events.name: Paris Fashion Week Men's FW26/27
events.note: Organized by FHCM. Final stop of menswear month following London, Florence (Pitti), and Milan.

events.name: Pitti Bimbo (January)
events.note: International children's fashion trade show. Held parallel with Pitti Filati.

events.name: Paris Haute Couture Week SS26
events.note: Spring/Summer 2026 haute couture collections. Nearly 100 shows across iconic Parisian venues.

events.name: Copenhagen Fashion Week AW26
events.note: 20th anniversary edition. Sustainability Requirements mandate 19 minimum standards for all participating brands.

events.name: Texworld Apparel Sourcing Paris (February)
events.location: Parc des Expositions Paris-Le Bourget, France
events.note: 1,300+ manufacturers from 35 countries. Europe's largest fabric and garment sourcing event.

events.name: Première Vision Paris (February)
events.note: Nearly 1,000 international exhibitors. Fabrics, leathers, accessories, design, manufacturing.

events.name: Seoul Fashion Week FW26
events.location: Dongdaemun Design Plaza (DDP), Seoul, South Korea
events.note: 24 brands, 15 fashion shows and 9 presentations. Mix of emerging, mid-career, and veteran designers.

events.name: New York Fashion Week FW26/27
events.note: 60+ runway shows and presentations. Calvin Klein Collection returned to the runway.

events.name: MAGIC Las Vegas (February)
events.note: World's largest fashion marketplace. 2,600+ brands from 45+ countries. With Project, Sourcing, Offprice.

events.name: London Fashion Week FW26/27
events.note: 38 shows and 12 presentations. Burberry, Erdem, Simone Rocha, Richard Quinn. Temperley London returned after 7 years.

events.name: Milan Fashion Week Women's FW26/27
events.note: Maria Grazia Chiuri's Fendi debut, Demna's Gucci debut (Feb 27), Meryll Rogge's first Marni show.

events.name: Coterie New York (February)
events.location: Jacob Javits Center, New York, USA
events.note: 1,000+ contemporary brands. Part of Fashion by Informa alongside MAGIC New York.

events.name: Paris Fashion Week Women's FW26/27
events.note: Nine-day schedule closing fashion month. Dior opened (Mar 3) with Jonathan Anderson's sophomore collection. Matthieu Blazy's second Chanel collection.

events.name: LVMH Prize Semi-Final (13th edition)
events.note: 13th edition. 20 semi-finalists from 15+ countries. First time at La Samaritaine. Grand Prize: EUR 400,000.

events.name: Seoul Fashion Week SS27
events.location: Dongdaemun Design Plaza (DDP), Seoul, South Korea
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 collections. Second edition of the year.

events.name: Rakuten Fashion Week Tokyo AW26
events.note: 34 runway shows and presentations. A/W 2026 collections.

events.name: Shanghai Fashion Week AW26
events.note: Overlaps with China Fashion Week (Mar 20–28). Focus on fashion, technology, sustainability, and cultural innovation.

events.name: Rio Fashion Week (RIOFW)
events.note: 1a edicao. Produzido pela IMM com direcao criativa de Paulo Borges. 24 apresentacoes. Marcas: Osklen, Salinas, Lenny Niemeyer, Isabela Capeto. Inclui Business Sessions.

events.name: MAGIC Nashville
events.note: MAGIC expands to Nashville for the first time.

events.name: Met Gala 2026
events.location: Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York, USA
events.note: Theme: 'Costume Art.' Dress code: 'Fashion Is Art.' Co-chairs: Beyonce, Nicole Kidman, Venus Williams. Exhibition opens May 10.

events.name: Global Fashion Summit: Copenhagen 2026
events.note: Theme: 'Building Resilient Futures.' Organized by Global Fashion Agenda. Responsible working conditions, circularity, resource stewardship.

events.name: Costume Art Exhibition (Met Costume Institute)
events.location: Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York, USA
events.note: Inaugurates the new Conde M. Nast Galleries. 400+ objects including garments, paintings, and artworks. Explores fashion as art.

events.name: Australian Fashion Week
events.location: Museum of Contemporary Art, Sydney, Australia
events.note: 30th anniversary. New venue at MCA on Sydney Harbour (moved from Carriageworks). Strengthened First Nations program.

events.name: BoF Professional: The Business of Beauty Global Forum
events.location: Stanly Ranch, Napa Valley, CA, USA
events.note: 4th edition of BoF's beauty industry gathering.

events.name: LVMH Prize Final & Ceremony (13th edition)
events.note: Final round and award ceremony. 8 finalists selected from semi-final compete for the Grand Prize (EUR 400,000).

events.name: Casa de Criadores (58a edicao)
events.note: Principal plataforma de moda autoral e independente do Brasil. 57a edicao (2025) reuniu 42 marcas e 15 expositores.

events.name: Pitti Uomo 110
events.note: Summer edition. Guest Designer: DSM Kei Ninomiya.

events.name: Paris Fashion Week Men's SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 menswear collections. FHCM confirmed.

events.name: Pitti Bimbo (June)
events.note: Summer edition. Children's fashion and lifestyle.

events.name: Pitti Filati 99
events.note: Yarn and knitwear trade show. 99th edition.

events.name: ANDAM Prize (37th edition)
events.note: 37th edition. Jury president: Alexandre Mattiussi (Ami Paris). Grand Prize: EUR 300,000.

events.name: Paris Haute Couture Week FW26/27
events.note: Fall/Winter 2026-27 haute couture collections. Grand Palais, Palais de Tokyo among venues.

events.name: Copenhagen Fashion Week SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 collections. Exact dates TBD.

events.name: MAGIC Las Vegas (August)
events.note: Fall edition. 2,600+ brands across women's, men's, and children's apparel, footwear, accessories.

events.name: Rakuten Fashion Week Tokyo SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 collections.

events.name: Texworld Apparel Sourcing Paris (September)
events.location: Parc des Expositions Paris-Le Bourget, France
events.note: Fall edition with Leatherworld addition. 1,700+ exhibitors.

events.name: Première Vision Paris (September)
events.note: September edition. Trend laboratory and sourcing platform.

events.name: Who's Next Paris (September)
events.note: 1,200+ exhibiting brands. Conferences, masterclasses, workshops.

events.name: New York Fashion Week SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 collections. Beginning Sep 2026, animal fur banned from the Official NYFW Schedule.

events.name: Coterie New York (September)
events.location: Jacob Javits Center, New York, USA
events.note: Fall edition. Contemporary brands showcase for buyers and retailers.

events.name: Pitti Fragranze
events.note: International fragrance and beauty trade event. Artisanal, niche, and luxury perfumery.

events.name: Green Carpet Fashion Awards
events.note: Founded by Eco-Age. Honors sustainable achievements in fashion. Dates typically align with Milan or London fashion weeks.

events.name: London Fashion Week SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 collections. BFC confirmed dates.

events.name: Milan Fashion Week Women's SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 womenswear. CNMI confirmed.

events.name: Paris Fashion Week Women's SS27
events.note: Closing fashion month. FHCM confirmed nine-day schedule.

events.name: International Woolmark Prize 2027
events.note: 5 finalists compete over 8 months. Winner receives AUD 300,000.

events.name: Shanghai Fashion Week SS27
events.note: Spring/Summer 2027 collections.

events.name: Sao Paulo Fashion Week N61 (SPFW 30 Anos)
events.note: A partir de 2026, SPFW passa a ter uma edicao por ano no 2o semestre, integrada ao Calendario Oficial da Moda Brasileira junto com a RIOFW no 1o semestre. Comemora 30 anos.

events.name: CFDA Fashion Awards
events.note: Annual awards by the Council of Fashion Designers of America, honoring excellence in American fashion design.

events.name: FN Achievement Awards
events.note: Footwear News Achievement Awards. Annual ceremony honoring excellence in the footwear industry.

events.name: Veste Rio
events.note: Evento de moda carioca reunindo marcas e designers do Rio de Janeiro.

events.name: BoF VOICES
events.note: Business of Fashion annual gathering for fashion industry leaders.

events.name: The Fashion Awards (BFC)
events.note: Presented by the British Fashion Council. Main fundraiser for the BFC Foundation. Traditionally held first Monday of December.
